title: Add quest dashboard Worker
author: voodoohop
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds `apps/operation/quest-dashboard` as a standalone Cloudflare Worker for the live quest dashboard.
- Serves the dashboard shell plus cached UI assets, with `/data` backed by the prod D1 rewards ledger.
- Orders the live feed by normalized reward timestamps and ranks quests by claimed Pollen.
- Validated with `npx biome check --write ...`, `npm run deploy -- --dry-run`, and live `/data` checks.

gist.headline: The Quest Board is Live
gist.blurb: We've launched a live quest dashboard! Now you can track the latest rewards, see who's claiming Pollen, and check out the top-ranked quests in real-time.
gist.summary: Added a standalone Cloudflare Worker for the live quest dashboard that serves real-time data directly from the production D1 rewards ledger.
gist.impact: Users can now view a live feed of completed quests ordered by timestamp and see which quests are generating the most claimed Pollen.
gist.visual_concept: A retro RPG-style wooden quest notice board. Polly the bee wearing a tiny adventurer's hat looking at the board. The board has glowing digital bounties or papers on it.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee mascot wearing a tiny adventurer's hat, looking at a wooden quest notice board covered in glowing digital bounties. A chunky retro robot companion points excitedly at a quest paper. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi RPG vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
